prerequisites.value: Vital Strike; Heavy Gravity Acclimation or Light Gravity Acclimation.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using any Vital Strike feat in an area of light or heavy gravity, roll the weaponâs damage dice for the attack one additional time. For example, if using Improved Vital Strike, you would roll the weaponâs damage dice for the attack four times before adding other damage bonuses, instead of three times.
